title: TheMCBrosLib
description: Library mod for mods by TheMCBrothers
body:
![TheMCBrosLib](https://i.imgur.com/TErmXx7.png)

TheMCBrosLib is a library mod for mods made by TheMCBrothers
 

### Check out our mods:

- [Useful Machinery](/mod/useful-machinery)
